description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jkosgei/chrome Docker image and a before_script that runs npm -v, node -v, pwd and ls -l for every job. Define two stages: dependences and tests. In the dependences stage add an install job that runs npm install and stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact that expires in one week. In the tests stage add a tests job that runs npm install chromedriver, then npm run test and npm run e2e. No caches, services, or deployment targets are configured.
